occurrenceSnapshots.title: Occurrence snapshots
occurrenceSnapshots.intro: Periodic exports of GBIF occurrence data
occurrenceSnapshots.description: Every month GBIF takes a full occurrence snapshot, saved in different formats to ease usage. All snapshots are issued with a DOI to simplify citation, and some formats are copied to public clouds for easy use on those environments.

cloudDatasets.title: Cloud-based datasets
cloudDatasets.description: GBIF makes data available on the <azure>Microsoft Planetary Computer (Azure)</azure>, as an <aws>Amazon AWS Open Dataset</aws> and on a public Google <gcs>GCS bucket</gcs> and <bq>BigQuery table</bq>. When using cloud-based snapshots, we always recommend creating a <derived>Derived Dataset citation</derived> for the records that you use. When referring to the full dataset, please use the appropriate citation found below.

monthly.title: Monthly snapshot datasets
monthly.description: The monthly exports of GBIF are listed below, available in various formats. Please see the citation on each page.
